case_title: ATEL CASH DISTRIBUTION FUND VI, LP, A CALIFORNIA et al VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL MOTION IN DEPT. 501, DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO APR-05-2012 TO BE HEARD IN DEPT. 302. MOVING PARTY ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND PROVIDE COURTESY COPY OF REPLY BY MAR-28-2012 4:00 PM. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, NOT REPORTED

LAW AND MOTION 302, A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION AND SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION. COMMERCIAL CODE 3420 IS NOT APPLICABLE AND DOES NOT DISPLACE THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION. THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION IS NOT UNCERTAIN. PLAINTIFFS CONCEDE THEY DO NOT HAVE STANDING TO BRING THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. DONALD F. DRUMMOND OF DRUMMOND & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 433-2261 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. KURT C. WENDLENNER OF SEVERSON & WERSON, TEL. NO. 677-5572 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Overruled as to the second cause of action and sustained without leave to amend as to the third cause of action. Commercial Code 3420 is not applicable and does not displace the second cause of action. The second cause of action is not uncertain. Plaintiffs concede they do not have standing to bring the third cause of action. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DONALD F. DRUMMOND OF DRUMMOND & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 433-2261 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. KURT C. WENDLENNER OF SEVERSON & WERSON, TEL. NO. 677-5572 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT COMERICA BANK'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Overruled. The forgery statutes are inapplicable to the complete absence of an endorsement. The first cause of action is not uncertain.(Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)
